---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement (e.g. cooling/zone support)
title: ''

---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Hardware context**
If this is about cooling, add-on coolers, or zones: what units/zones does your MagIQTouch system
have? (Testers with this hardware are especially welcome — these paths are unimplemented because
the maintainer's system is heater-only.)
